error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'manager')
title: TypeError during n8n initialization
symptom: Upon starting n8n, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'manager')'. This prevents n8n from initializing properly.
not_this_if: Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: This error typically arises when there are issues with the local node modules, often due to corrupted installations or mismatched dependencies after an upgrade. The 'manager' property is likely part of a module that failed to load correctly.
fix_steps: Remove the node_modules directory and any lock files
Reinstall the dependencies using npm install
agent_instruction: Remove the node_modules directory and reinstall dependencies to resolve the initialization error.
